title: Glorious Braised Mediterranean Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Mediterranean dish featuring tender lamb in a sweet and spicy sauce, served with a side of fluffy rice.

ingredients.name: lamb shoulder
ingredients.notes: boneless and cut into 2 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the rice wine, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until it is tender and falling apart.
Remove the Dutch oven from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the lamb and sauce over fluffy rice, using a lazy Susan spinner to facilitate serving.
